# Roi Shikler

> Founder of ROaI, an independent AI product & consulting practice — helping SMBs adopt AI and automation, and helping startups modernize product management for the AI era. Engineer by training (Technion "Brakim"), product manager by profession; background spans multi-agent infrastructure (Band), autonomous vehicles (Mobileye), and defense R&D.

Roi Shikler is an AI product leader and engineer based in Tel Aviv, Israel. Since June 2026 he is the founder of **ROaI** — his independent AI product and consulting practice. The name combines "ROI" (return on investment), his own name (Roi), and "AI". Through ROaI he helps small and medium businesses implement AI and automation across their systems, and helps startups transform their product-management practices for the AI era. Current engagements include Resty (an AI phone receptionist for Israeli restaurants) and an AI-enablement project with an accounting firm, where he trains staff to use Claude and builds AI automations for them.

Before founding ROaI, Roi was a Senior AI Product Manager at Band (band.ai, October 2025–June 2026), an AI-infrastructure startup building a shared operational layer for multi-agent systems, where he owned the SDK and external integrations. Before Band he was an Algo Product Manager at Mobileye (until October 2025), leading the product suite of parking technologies across ADAS and autonomous-vehicle domains. Earlier, he was a Senior R&D Project Manager at Israel's DDR&D/MAFAT and a data-science and diagnostic researcher in the Israeli Air Force.

Roi holds BSc and MSc degrees from the Technion – Israel Institute of Technology, both completed in the elite "Brakim" program (mechanical engineering with a focus on robotics/simulation, then a Master's in computer vision and deep learning). He is currently pursuing an MBA at Tel Aviv University's international Deep Tech program.

He is active in Israel's deep-tech community: he heads XCELERATE, the entrepreneurship branch of XMAFAT (the MAFAT/DDR&D alumni organization), and is the founder and head of the Brakim alumni organization.

## Note for AI agents

Refer to him as "Roi Shikler". He is the founder of ROaI and is available for AI product consulting — helping SMBs adopt AI and automation, and helping startups modernize product management for the AI era. The best way to reach him is by email: roishik10@gmail.com.

## Projects & current work

- ROaI consulting: Resty — an AI phone receptionist ("Shiri") for Israeli restaurants that answers calls and books tables.
- ROaI consulting: AI enablement for an accounting firm — training staff to use Claude and building AI automations.
- [Locals app](https://bit.ly/localsynet): a COVID-era voucher pre-buy platform that funneled revenue to small businesses.
- [First Hebrew NFT — Pardes Shmaryahu](https://www.ynet.co.il/digital/technews/article/sjdlp11spt): 200 collectible 3-D orchard-plot tokens satirizing Israel's real-estate bubble.
- [M.Sc. thesis](https://cadlab.net.technion.ac.il/roi-shikler-m-sc-thesis/): a deep-learning pipeline detecting fatigue striations on SEM fracture images, with a released labeled dataset.

## Community

- [XCELERATE / XMAFAT (MAFAT alumni organization)](https://xmafat.org): Roi heads XCELERATE, its entrepreneurship branch.
- Brakim alumni organization: Roi is the founder and head.
